name: Amish Friendship Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. On mixing day, combine starter in a large non-metallic bowl with 1 cup flour, 1 cup sugar, and 1 cup milk. Mix thoroughly.
2. Pour 4 equal parts of the batter into ziploc baggies. Keep 1 for yourself, then give the other 3 away along with instructions on how to care for it.
3. To the remaining batter, add all the other ingredients (vanilla extract, eggs) and mix thoroughly.
4. Grease two large loaf pans or a 9 x 13 cake pan.
5. Combine 1/4 cup sugar with 1/4 teaspoon cinnamon and coat the bottoms and sides of the pans.
6. Place the batter into the prepared pans.
7. Coat the top of the batter with butter and sprinkle with remaining cinnamon/sugar mixture.
8. Bake at 325°F for 50-75 minutes, or until done.
